about.zh: 邸岸空间建筑设计事务所成立于南京，专注于高端住宅、商业空间及文化项目的室内设计与建筑改造。我们相信空间是生活的容器，每一个项目都是与业主共同书写的叙事。
about.en: ADDA architecture is a Nanjing-based design studio specializing in high-end residential, commercial, and cultural projects. We believe space is the container of life — every project is a narrative co-authored with our clients.
about.clients: 保利 · 滨江 · 招商
